reason: Single project-level character board will be generated directly in the parent thread for immediate visual supervision and QC; no background Codex thread is required.

jobs.thread_title: 断航故土 北境攻城兵种通用多状态角色板 v01
jobs.history_policy: If future iterations supersede the canonical file, move retained intermediates into project/severed-homeland/assets/characters/history/ with a .vNNN filename suffix.
retry_rules: Retry if the board redesigns the Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem or makes it a large badge, new crest, or single-animal logo.
Retry if the board contains only four templates or misses any of the eight required roles.
Retry if the eight models collapse into the same generic orc body with swapped weapons.
Retry if any model becomes a human Grey Wall soldier, Suming insect infantry, Luming noble shaman, or modern/fantasy plate-armored unit.
Retry if visible text, labels, UI, or watermark appear.
Retry if the result reads as a monster horde instead of identifiable siege troop modeling.
